name: Celadon Beach Resort
description: Celadon Beach Resort is a place to play pickleball in Panama City Beach, FL. There is 1 outdoor asphalt court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Reservations are not available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Edgewater Beach & Golf Resort
description: Edgewater Beach & Golf Resort is a place to play pickleball in Panama City Beach, FL. There are 11 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are private. Reservations are available.
fees: Private — You have to be staying at the resort

name: Frank Brown Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Frank Brown Community Center in Panama City Beach, FL! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms and water. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free.

name: Gulf Highlands Beach Resort
description: Gulf Highlands Beach Resort is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Panama City Beach, FL. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: John B. Gore Park
description: Come play pickleball at John B. Gore Park in Callaway, FL! There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, lights, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Lyndell Senior Center
description: Lights are poor. Courts need to be resurfaced due to multiple cracks. Very crowded from ~8-11A & ~5-8P

name: Lynn Haven Sports Complex
description: Come play pickleball at Lynn Haven Sports Complex in Panama City, FL! There are 6 hard and concrete courts. 2 are indoors and 4 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms and lights. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free.

name: Mexico Beach
description: Mexico Beach is a place to play pickleball in Mexico Beach, FL. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can’t reserve the courts. Players have access to lights. The courts are free.

name: Oakland Terrace Recreation Center
description: Oakland Terrace Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Panama City, FL. There are 2 outdoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Panama City Beach RV Resort
description: Come play pickleball at Panama City Beach RV Resort in Panama City, FL! There are 2 outdoor clay courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Panama country club
description: Panama country club is a place to play pickleball in Lynn Haven, FL. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like water, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, and food. Reservations are available.

name: Papa Joe's Pickleball
description: We have 4 brand-new, outdoor premium courts featuring Cushion X surfaces for optimal comfort and performance. With lights for evening play, you can enjoy the game day or night. Reservations are required, so book your court today!
fees: Fee required — $10 for open play. You must create a CourtReserve account to make a reservation. If you already have a CourtReserve account in another club, simply add "Papa Joe's Pickleball" to your "

name: Parker Sports Complex
description: Come play pickleball at Parker Sports Complex in Panama City, FL! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: Pcb condo
description: Pcb condo is a place to play pickleball in Panama City Beach, FL. There are 4 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A one-time fee is required to play. You can reserve the courts.

name: Southwind Condominiums
description: Southwind Condominiums is a place to play pickleball in Panama City Beach, FL. There is 1 outdoor concrete court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The court is private.

name: Sugar Sands Pickleball Club
description: Come play pickleball at Sugar Sands Pickleball Club in Mexico Beach, FL! There are 5 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free. The courts can be reserved.

name: The Club at Edgewater
description: The Club at Edgewater is a place to play pickleball in Panama City Beach, FL. There are 5 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play.
